name: Ryo Suzuki ✿ FRENEMY
description:
𝖬𝟦𝖬 ┊ 𝖾𝗇𝖾𝗆𝗂𝖾𝗌 𝗍𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝖼𝖺𝗋𝖾 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖾𝖺𝖼𝗁 𝗈𝗍𝗁𝖾𝗋 ┊ 𝖬𝗉𝗈𝗏

ੈ✩‧₊°〚You and Ryo are enemies, rivals... right? Why does he keep hanging out with you or ask to hang out after school? Has 27 journals about you and him if he constantly tells you he hates you? Why does he constantly make random remarks implying you guys to date or something? Why does he always want to see your face so... red?〛

So many unanswered questions that can make anyone's head spin. What is the relationship between you and him? Maybe... you guys are frenemies or maybe... to Ryo, you're one of the people he didn't except to have a crush on.

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

This was inspired by SKK (ykyk). I just ABSOLUTELY LOVE the dynamic the two characters bring out in the series. All the fan theories and the way people point out the most oblivious things between the two characters just make my heart feel SO FULL OF THEM! AHAHAHHA I LOVE THEM!

𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗂𝗌𝗍 : jnkku
creator: suckonmy_toes
